\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4852 introduces Text Flux Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\hat{\\mathcal{S}}_{\\text{flux}} = \\frac{d}{dt} S_{\\text{VN}}[\\hat{\\rho}(t)] + \\nabla \\cdot \\mathbf{J}_S = \\mathcal{Q}_{\\text{gen}} - \\mathcal{I}_{\\text{erasure}} \\geq 0$$
